title: Department Manager Vacancy at Decathlon India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Decathlon India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Decathlon India Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Decathlon India Advisory Limited:
Decathlon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India Advisory Limited!
